arts.ttl: Bayern have "realistic chance" of signing Wirtz this summer
arts.sum: AZ reports that Bayern Munich have a "realistic chance" of signing Florian Wirtz from Bayer Leverkusen this summer.

arts.ttl: One last hurdle to clear before Upamecano can extend his Bayern deal
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are closing in on a new deal for Dayot Upamecano, but there is still one important hurdle to clear.

arts.ttl: Chances of Sané staying at Bayern rise
arts.sum: The chances of Leroy Sané signing a new contract with Bayern Munich appear to be on the rise.

arts.ttl: 'I've played with Harry Kane as well as Man City and PSG stars – but Sadio Mane was the best'
arts.sum: On-loan Tottenham Hotspur forward Mathys Tel played with both Sadio Mane and Harry Kane at Bayern Munich, with one leaving a stronger impression than the other

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich have a “realistic chance” of signing Florian Wirtz this summer
arts.sum: As reported by Abendzeitung, Bayern Munich have a “realistic chance” of signing Florian Wirtz this summer. The world talent’s current contract with Bayer Leverkusen keeps him at the club until…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge “optimistic” for Champions League tie vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge is “optimistic” about his club’s chances against Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League . Looking for more thoughts and discussion on the aftermath of Bayern Munich ’s 4-0 victory over Eintracht Frankfurt?

arts.ttl: Champions League power rankings as Real Madrid and Liverpool eye European glory
arts.sum: Real Madrid, Liverpool and Barcelona are among the favourites to win the Champions League with the last 16 beginning this week as several heavyweight ties await

arts.ttl: Lothar Matthäus says Bayern Munich should extend Leon Goretzka
arts.sum: Also, be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. “You need these aggressive players like Goretzka and Laimer in your team — not just artists like Wirtz and Musiala, but also those who do the dirty work at the back and win duels.”

arts.ttl: “Our players should stop complaining!” — Bayern Munich’s Rummenigge takes a hard stance on the congested schedule
arts.sum: Players at top clubs rarely get any breaks anymore, consistently burdened with a game every three days and seeing new competitions, such as UEFA’s Nations League and FIFA’s Club World Cup, added to the schedule. Then the money will have to come from other competitions like the new Club World Cup in the summer.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich wanted to sell Mathys Tel in order to have cash for summer transfers
arts.sum: Bayern were ready to sell Mathys Tel to Tottenham for €60m in January in order to add much needed funds to their ‘fixed deposit account’ with a view to summer transfers. According to a report from Sport Bild journalists Christian Falk and Tobi Altschäffl (as captured by @MiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich had a vested intertest in trying to sell Mathys Tel during the winter transfer window .
